body:
## Summary
- Adds PvE XState phase/state skeleton under backend logic
- Adds runtime actor registry and socket handlers for startPveGame/selectSkills/playerAction
- Adds damage/death events to reach GAME_OVER and emit gameOver
- Adds unit tests (state/machine/runtime/socketHandlers)
- Updates docs/socket.md to reflect current PvE socket contract

## Verification
- cd CardGame/backend && npm run test:unit
- cd CardGame/backend && npm run lint
title: feat: basic xstate machine model + socket start
